chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1449 of 2012 C.P No.D-1499 of 2012 C.P No.D-1865 of 2012 C.P No.D-3531 of 2016 C.P No.D-3405 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) 28-03-2019. Mr. Jangu Khan, Special Prosecutor NAB. = Petitioner Ehsan Ali Jarwar in C.P No.D-1865 of 2012 is present and submits that the trial has ended and he has been acquitted vide judgment dated 27.02.2019, whereas the remaining petitioners have been convicted. This fact has been confirmed by learned Special Prosecutor NAB, who has brought on record a copy of the judgment and submits that all these petitions have become infructuous and same may be dismissed accordingly. In view of the above fact, all these petitions are dismissed as having become infructuous. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
